expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

tables.name: @Dataset Metadata
partitionExpressions:
let
 Refresh = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.FromList(List.DateTimes(DateTime.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), 1, #duration(0, 0, 0, 0)), Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Last Data Refresh (UTC)"}, null, ExtraValues.Error), {{"Last Data Refresh (UTC)", type datetime}}),
#"Added Environment" = Table.AddColumn(Refresh, "Environment", each _Environment),
#"Added BuildNumber" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Environment", "Build Number", each _BuildNumber)

 in
#"Added BuildNumber"

measures.name: Average Days Factory to Handover
measures.expression:
AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(
        'Purchase Order Intake',
        'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Factory Date] > DATE(1900,1,1)
        && 'Purchase Order Intake'[Handover Window Start Date] > DATE(1900,1,1)
    ),
    DATEDIFF(
        'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Factory Date],
        'Purchase Order Intake'[Handover Window Start Date],
        DAY
    )
)

measures.name: Average Days Intake Delay (Delayed Deliveries Only)
measures.expression:
VAR LateRows =
    FILTER(
        'Purchase Order Intake',
        'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Delivery Final Warehouse Date] > DATE(1900,1,1)
        && NOT ISBLANK('Purchase Order Intake'[PO Intake Date])
        && DATEDIFF(
             'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Delivery Final Warehouse Date],
             'Purchase Order Intake'[PO Intake Date],
             DAY
           ) > 0
    )
VAR TotalDelay =
    SUMX(
        LateRows,
        DATEDIFF(
            'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Delivery Final Warehouse Date],
            'Purchase Order Intake'[PO Intake Date],
            DAY
        )
    )
VAR LateCount = COUNTROWS(LateRows)
RETURN
    DIVIDE(TotalDelay, LateCount, BLANK())

measures.name: Average Days Intake Delay
measures.expression:
VAR ValidRows =
    FILTER(
        'Purchase Order Intake',
        'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Delivery Final Warehouse Date] > DATE(1900,1,1)
        && 'Purchase Order Intake'[PO Intake Date] > DATE(1900,1,1)
    )
VAR TotalDelay =
    SUMX(
        ValidRows,
        VAR Diff =
            DATEDIFF(
                'Purchase Order Intake'[Expected Delivery Final Warehouse Date],
                'Purchase Order Intake'[PO Intake Date],
                DAY
            )
        RETURN
            IF(Diff > 0, Diff, 0)
    )
VAR RowCount = COUNTROWS(ValidRows)
RETURN
    DIVIDE(TotalDelay, RowCount, BLANK())

        || ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Calendar Week Id] )
        || ISINSCOPE ('Date'[Calendar Month Id] )
        || ISINSCOPE ('Date'[Calendar Year Month Id] )

measures.name: Permanent Markdown Spend Value - Saleable LY
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate     = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1

VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR MaxSelectedDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR IsTodayInFilter =
    CONTAINS ( SelectedDates, 'Date'[Calendar Date], TodayDate )

VAR SnapshotDate =
    IF ( IsTodayInFilter, YesterdayDate, MaxSelectedDate )

VAR LYDates =
    CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year] ),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate
    )

VAR LYDateFilterTable =
    FILTER (
        ALL ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LYDates
    )

RETURN
IF (
    ISEMPTY ( LYDates ),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE (
        [Permanent Markdown Spend Value - Saleable],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),
        LYDateFilterTable
    )
)

measures.name: Tradeable Stock Buy Value LW
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate     = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1

VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR MaxSelectedDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR IsTodayInFilter =
    CONTAINS ( SelectedDates, 'Date'[Calendar Date], TodayDate )

VAR SnapshotDate =
    IF ( IsTodayInFilter, YesterdayDate, MaxSelectedDate )

VAR LWDates =
    CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Week] ),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate
    )

VAR LWDateFilterTable =
    FILTER (
        ALL ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LWDates
    )

RETURN
IF (
    ISEMPTY ( LWDates ),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE (
        [Tradeable Stock Buy Value],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),
        LWDateFilterTable
    )
)

measures.name: Go Live Option Count LY
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES('Date'[Calendar date])
 
VAR LYDates =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        DISTINCT('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year]),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
    )
 
RETURN
IF(
    ISEMPTY(LYDates),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE(
        [Go Live Option Count],
        REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
        REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LYDates
    )
)
